name: boxlang-starter-electron
description: A starter BoxLang application for building desktop applications with Electron

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "vite" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron app/electron/Main.js"
scripts.package: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge make
scripts.package:mac: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge make --platform darwin
scripts.package:win: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge make --platform win32
scripts.package:linux: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge make --platform linux
scripts.package:mac:dryrun: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge publish --platform=darwin --dry-run
scripts.package:win:dryrun: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge publish --platform=win32 --dry-run
scripts.package:linux:dryrun: npm run inject-build-id && npm run package:jre && npm run build && electron-forge publish --platform=linux --dry-run
scripts.package:linux:docker: docker build -f scripts/Dockerfile.linux-build -t boxlang-linux-build . && docker run --rm --privileged -v "$(pwd)":/app -v boxlang_linux_node_modules:/app/node_modules boxlang-linux-build
scripts.package:full: npm run package:jre && npm run package:miniserver && npm run package

author: Ortus Solutions, Corp
